title: Change Tab Overview
description: Studio UI for **Change Tab Overview**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Change Tab Overview**.
context: Studio UI for **Change Tab Overview**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Change Tab Overview**.

rules.requirement: change tab refetches conditional status when updatedAt advances
rules: While this change tab is visible, the view MUST call `getChangeStatus(name, { ifModifiedSince })` using the last seen `updatedAt`. When the API returns `unchanged: true`, the view MUST skip heavy refetch. When `updatedAt` advances, the view MUST refetch **conditional status**. Polling MUST pause when the tab is hidden or the window lacks focus. After a successful Save, the view MUST refetch immediately.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors (including HTTP 409 on save conflicts where applicable).

rules.requirement: overview includes workflow and validation status
rules:
Overview MUST embed `getChangeStatus` results for the open **active** or **drafted** change: next action, blockers, and lifecycle transitions. Overview MUST NOT duplicate the Artifacts tab (no per-artifact file list on Overview). Next actions and blockers MUST be displayed using shadcn **`Card`** or **`Alert`** components as appropriate for their severity.

For **archived** and **discarded** changes, the shell MUST NOT poll workflow status. The **Workflow & validation** card MUST show the embedded message **Workflow status unavailable.** (same copy as archived), not an API error from `getChangeStatus`.

Overview MUST delegate description, invalidation policy, read-only specs/deps, and scope dialog to [`ui:change-metadata-editor`](../change-metadata-editor/spec.md). Layout order: title → lifecycle actions → metadata block → workflow & validation → summary cards → specs & dependencies → recent events.

The Overview header MUST render a `ChangeLifecycleActions` block immediately below the change title. The block's content depends on which sidebar list the open change belongs to:

- **active** — shows **Shelf to drafts**, **Discard** (destructive), and **Archive** (only when state is `archivable` or `signed-off`). Overview editors (description, scope, invalidation) are enabled.
- **draft** / **discarded** — shelved read-only: same banner pattern as archived (distinct copy), no Overview editors, no Validate All, inspector Monaco read-only without Save/Validate, lifecycle actions only where applicable (restore/discard on draft; none on discarded).
- **draft** — shows **Restore to active** and **Discard** (destructive).
- **discarded** — shows a read-only notice ("permanently discarded, cannot be restored").
- **archived** or `null` — no lifecycle block is rendered.

Each lifecycle action MUST open a Studio confirmation modal (`ChangeLifecycleConfirmDialog`) before calling the port. Discard MUST use a destructive-styled modal that states the action is irreversible. Lifecycle actions MUST be disabled while `lifecycleBusy` is true to prevent double-submission. After each action the shell MUST refetch both `getChange` detail and `getChangeStatus` for the open change.

The **Discard permanently** control MUST be visually separated from reversible actions (right-aligned with a divider when other actions are present).

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches conditional status when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Unchanged status skips tab refetch
then: tab does not refetch heavy views
AND spinner stops without data swap

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches conditional status when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Advanced updatedAt refetches tab data
then: only this tab data sources reload
AND other tabs are unaffected

scenarios.requirement: change tab refetches conditional status when updatedAt advances
scenarios.name: Hidden tab pauses polling
given: change tab was visible then hidden
then: no tab-scoped status request is sent
AND cache is retained until visible again

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected
then: @specd/ui does not import @specd/core
AND components call client:port-* hooks

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: component mounts and requests change data
then: calls go through SpecdDataPort
AND no direct repository or kernel import

scenarios.name: Adding a core import fails the boundary
then: lint or build fails
AND data must flow through the port surface

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Hook exposes loading while port call is in flight
when: port method is invoked from the component
then: consumers observe loading state until the promise settles

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed fetch shows human-readable error
given: port returns a network or HTTP error
then: consumers receive an error object
AND UI renders the message instead of stale data

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Save conflict shows HTTP 409 to the user
when: inspector save hook completes with error
then: UI shows the conflict message
AND editor buffer is not silently replaced

scenarios.requirement: overview includes workflow and validation status
scenarios.name: Blockers appear on Overview
given: getChangeStatus returns blockers for the open change
then: blockers are listed in the workflow section on Overview
AND there is no separate Validation tab to open

scenarios.name: Specs readonly panel on Overview
then: studio-change-specs-readonly lists specs and dependencies
AND inline scope chips are not on Overview

scenarios.name: Draft Overview shows specs without scope dialog affordances
given: a drafted change with multiple specs
then: studio-change-specs-readonly lists specs and dependencies
AND studio-edit-spec-scope is not visible

scenarios.name: Active change shows shelf and discard
given: an active in-progress change is open
then: "Shelf to drafts" and "Discard" buttons appear in the header area
AND "Restore to active" is not shown

scenarios.name: Draft change shows restore and discard
then: "Restore to active" and "Discard" buttons appear
AND "Shelf to drafts" is not shown

scenarios.name: Discarded change shows read-only notice
then: a read-only notice is shown instead of action buttons

scenarios.name: Discarded change shows workflow status unavailable
when: Overview renders the Workflow & validation card
then: UI does not call getChangeStatus for that name
AND shows Workflow status unavailable.

scenarios.name: Archived change shows workflow status unavailable
when: Overview renders the Workflow & validation card
then: UI does not call getChangeStatus
AND shows Workflow status unavailable.

scenarios.name: Lifecycle actions require Studio confirmation modal
when: user clicks "Shelf to drafts" or "Discard permanently"
then: studio-change-lifecycle-confirm-dialog opens before the port call executes

scenarios.name: Discard is separated from safe actions
given: an active change with shelf and discard available
then: "Discard permanently" is right-aligned and separated from shelf/archive controls

scenarios.name: Lifecycle actions disabled while busy
given: a lifecycle action is in flight
then: all lifecycle buttons are disabled
AND double-submission is prevented

scenarios.name: Archive shown only when archivable
given: an active change in state archivable or signed-off
active change in any other state
then: "Archive" button is shown
"Archive" button is not shown
